subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, the All-Subduing, the Self-Subsisting. He hath ever existed, sanctified beyond all mention and utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو المهیمن القیوم لم یزل کان مقدسا عن الذکر و البیان و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @station of the Manifestation of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
